subcodes.title: Tablet of the Divine Plan (Western states I)
subcodes.first_line: O ye sons and daughters of the Kingdom! Day and night I have no other occupation
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ابناء و بنات ملکوت شب و روز جز یاد یاران و دعای خیر در حق ایشان و طلب تایید
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @predictions and prophecies, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @call to action, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
